jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Razorpay
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Razorpay in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Razorpay:
Razorpay is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay!
